raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"belief","confidence":0.62,"matched_text":"I share your hopes for the success of these initiatives and the need for other countries to follow the maldives' lead in addressing climate change.","distilled_fact":"The assistant shares the hope for the success of these initiatives and the need for other countries to follow the Maldives' lead in addressing climate change."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"belief","confidence":0.54,"matched_text":"climate change is a global issue that requires collective action","distilled_fact":"Climate change is a global issue that requires collective action."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"belief","confidence":0.6,"matched_text":"the maldives serves as an inspiring example of how a low-lying island nation can take innovative and comprehensive measures to mitigate and adapt to the impacts of climate change.","distilled_fact":"The Maldives serves as an inspiring example of how a low-lying island nation can take innovative and comprehensive measures to mitigate and adapt to the impacts of climate change."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"belief","confidence":0.57,"matched_text":"by sharing best practices and learning from each other, countries can work together to address the root cause of climate change and build a more sustainable and resilient future for all.","distilled_fact":"Countries can work together by sharing best practices and learning from each other to address the root cause of climate change and build a more sustainable and resilient future for all."}]}
